name: Mark Chalmers
background: Mr. Chalmers has served as the President and Chief Executive Officer of Energy Fuels since February 1, 2018. Prior to that, he served as the Chief Operating Officer of the Company from July 1, 2016 to January 31, 2018. He has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry, specifically in uranium and base metals.

companies.name: Energy Fuels Inc.
companies.title_or_role: Director, President and Chief Executive Officer
